title: uapaca vanhouttei
intro: Uapaca vanhouttei, also known as the Manicol tree, is a species of tree native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The plant's extracts have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Uapaca vanhouttei is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
